slides.title: Clear outcome-driven pitch title
slides.subtitle: One sentence on who this helps and why now.

visual_aid.purpose: Create a confident opening without unsupported proof.

speaker_notes.key_message: The audience should understand the outcome before details appear.
talk_track: Set the context in plain language.
Avoid hype; make the audience care about the problem.

slides.title: The problem is costly and visible
body: Name the audience or buyer affected.
Show why existing workarounds are weak.

visual_aid.purpose: Reveal the problem in order instead of crowding the slide.

validation.expected: The problem bullets reveal as Marp fragments in HTML.
validation.fallback: Use a static three-bullet problem slide.

motion.purpose: Pace the problem before the solution appears.
motion.reduced_motion_fallback: All bullets stay readable without animation.

speaker_notes.key_message: The problem must feel specific, costly, and urgent.
talk_track: Tie the pain to a visible business consequence.

visual_aid.purpose: Make the change in workflow visible at a glance.

validation.expected: The two panels remain balanced and readable.
validation.fallback: Split old and new workflows across two slides.

speaker_notes.key_message: The new workflow should feel materially easier to adopt.
talk_track: Contrast the current pain with the proposed behavior.
Do not claim superiority without evidence.

slides.title: How the product creates the outcome
body: Keep the mechanism simple enough to retell.
slides.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Input] --> B[Core workflow]
  B --> C[Output]
  C --> D[User value]

visual_aid.purpose: Give the audience a simple mental model for the product.

validation.expected: The flow renders without dense labels or crossing lines.
validation.fallback: Replace the diagram with a three-step list.

speaker_notes.key_message: The mechanism should be easy to retell after the meeting.
talk_track: Name the transformation, not every feature.
Stop before the diagram becomes implementation detail.

visual_aid.purpose: Turn the decision criteria into a compact comparison.

validation.expected: The table is legible and does not exceed three rows of substance.
validation.fallback: Convert the strongest row into a single takeaway slide.

speaker_notes.key_message: The decision should follow from criteria the audience already accepts.
talk_track: Keep placeholder rows evidence-backed before presenting.
